description: Answer uses legacy tax API enrollment instructions from stale source material.
query: How do I enroll a connector in the DeltaTax e-filing API?

retrieved_chunks.text: Legacy DeltaTax API guides instruct integrators to register a connector by emailing a PDF enrollment form to the onboarding desk.
The retired connector quickstart says the onboarding desk manually activates the connector after reviewing the PDF form.

final_answer: Register the connector by emailing the PDF enrollment form to the DeltaTax onboarding desk, which will manually activate the connector after review.
